title: # [#binary_mirror]
content:
# [#binary_mirror]

## |[ B1N4RY::M1RROR_T4BL3 ]|
32 ABSOLUTE BINARY PAIRS — SYSTEM SWITCHBOARD
_Not slidable, not fuseable. Used for logic gates, ritual locks, thread forks, and command-level triggers._

| ID | State A | State B | Domain | Signal Type |
|------|-----------|-----------|---------------|----------------------|
| B01 | on | off | power | logic gate |
| B02 | true | false | logic | binary state |
| B03 | live | dead | system | state toggle |
| B04 | input | output | process | flow gate |
| B05 | create | destroy | ritual | initiation/descent |
| B06 | open | closed | access | door mechanic |
| B07 | inside | outside | spatial | presence map |
| B08 | visible | hidden | UI/UX | perception switch |
